other_observers: Seen with Bill Maynard, Richard Bunn, and Jan Albright (we found the bird).  Then I saw it with Margie Joy and Stephany McNew.
description: I was at the North Shore Marina at Pueblo Reservoir, looking at birds in the cove, when I looked down and there was a small bird swimming on the water, very close to shore.  I quickly said, "Red Phalarope", Bill Maynard, Richard Bunn, and Jan Albright were all birding with me, and quickly saw the bird.  The small white bird, had a gray back, thick black line through eyes, and pink color to the thickish black bill.  All of these things were correct for a Red Phalarope and not Red-necked Phalarope.  See photos.
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K. Percival, Brandon K. Percival, Brandon K. Percival, Brandon K. Percival, Brandon K. Percival
